title: DAM Thumbnail Previews

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

I’m currently building my company’s asset library using the DAM board in Monday. The one minor “bug” I’m encountering is when I hover my mouse over an attached asset, the thumbnail preview is blank:

2022-09-30-Crop1319×957 102 KB

These assets are all PNG files on a google drive. Whilst I can click through the asset link and it opens the image up in a new tab, is there anyway I can get the thumbnail to preview the file? Trying to make this library as user friendly as possible, and one less click will help with that.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tevans,

Are you currently on an Enterprise Plan or EU server? If you’re on the Enterprise Plan, as provided in this article - monday.com and HIPAA - your plan is HIPAA compliant, and will prevent previews of images or other files in emails. Alternatively, I am afraid if you’re currently on an EU server, Filestack (the file preview service) is not supported. This means that there are no file previews besides PDF and most images (MS Office is not supported).

Please let me know if this makes sense, and might be contributing to the issue!

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BiancaT - Thanks for the reply. I’ve been told we are on the pro plan (one down from enterprise). What would I need to do to get around my issue?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for clarifying this! Are you also able to confirm whether or not you’re on an EU server? This is also likely to be contributing to the issue if this is the case. If you’re unsure, please reach out to support@monday.com and they will be able to confirm this with your email. That said, if your account is not currently on an EU server, this does then sound a little strange, and our support team will be able to forward you to our technical support team for further investigation

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BiancaT I’m not sure sorry! We’re UK based so I’d assume we are. If that is the root of the issue, do you know if Filestack will be supported on EU servers in future?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve followed up internally on this one for you Tom, and will get back to you as soon as I hear back!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: https://monday.slack.com/archives/C03DB896CUS/p1666847986935679

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for your patience Tom! I have heard from the team who have confirmed that there are plans to have Filestack supported on EU servers in the near future, however they cannot commit to a specific date just yet as they work through a few unknowns. Sorry for lack of clarity, but please be assured this is on their radar

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @BiancaT ! I’ll wait and see

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BiancaT - Just thought I’d check in and see if there was any potential update available from you on rolling out Filestack support to EU servers? We’re getting ready to launch this monday board internally so figured I’d check before we did

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Tevans! Sorry for my delayed reply, I have been OOO! I will circle back with our team on this and update you as soon as I can

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BiancaT - is there any update available? Internally we’re getting ready to launch our around Feb/March time, and we’d really love to have the thumbnail preview available.

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BiancaT just checking in on this?

posts.author: Melodie (/)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

We have the same problem with the impossibility to work collaboratively on documents with the column “files”. It is also not possible to display the documents except in PDF format. We have to upload the document, modify and re-upload it on the colomn (without track change, comments,…) and all the difficulties with these numerous manipulations.

It’s because Filestack is not supported in UE. After many exchanges with the Monday support, we still have no idea of a possible resolution or an approximative timing.

I hope that the team will find a solution soon.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Melodie and @Tevans!

I have directly reached out to the relevant department on this as it seems my request about this update was missed. I am really sorry for the delay - I will try my best to have an answer for you within the next 24 hours

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: https://monday.slack.com/archives/C03DB896CUS/p1676927448503629

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BiancaT is it possible to get an update on this? I first asked about it back in September, if we could even just get some kind of definitive answer on a release date it’d really help. Cheers!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Tevans - I understand and appreciate you being so patient. I assure you that I am chasing the team for a more definitive answer and recognise it has taken a long time to provide you with this information It appears that the lead software engineer for this area has been OOO which explains the delay in my reply - my apologies! That said, from what I can understand an ETA has not been confirmed, however I do not want to commit to this response just yet until I hear from the engineer. I have reached out directly to her so am hoping to hear back by in next couple of days. I have my reminders set to circle back here with what I hope is a clear answer for this feature release.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Tevans - thank you again for your continued patience!

I have recently heard back from our software engineer who confirmed that they’re working on their own solution that will replace filestack. This is currently in development stages with a goal to have filestack replaced by end of March. This solution means that all data will be processed and saved on regional servers. I believe I should be receiving more information in the near future, so will refer back here when I do - I hope this helps in the meantime

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @BiancaT checking in on the above? We are basically ready to launch on DAM internally, but could hold off if the fix is nearly ready?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Tevans! I just followed up and the team has confirmed that our in-house file preview solution has now been released to 100% of all non HIPAA accounts across all regions Let me know how you go from here!

posts.author: Tevans (Tom Evans)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @BiancaT ah great! I’ve just tried to test it now but it seems the function isn’t working. I’ve uploaded an asset just now as a test but it doesn’t display a thumbnail as you can see - is there anything I need to do?

image1920×1080 145 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry @Tevans! I’ve followed up a few days ago and just waiting on a response from our developers who have been OOO due to Passover holidays in Israel. I will get back to you as soon as I can

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Reached out via private message @Tevans!

posts.author: seagaa (Andrew Seaga)
posts.cookedHtml: This has been really frustrating for us as well. We really want to use the DAM in Monday since we can link the image files to projects, but the lack of a thumbnail when using cloud services like sharepoint, box, onedrive, google drive etc makes this integration useless. This is especially frustration when trying to view different versions of images. I see this as a bug, not a feature request.

posts.author: NicoMutert (Nico Mutert)
posts.cookedHtml:
First of all: Big thanks for staying with us with this topic for such a long time and keeping us updated - great community management/customer service!

I’d like to know as well why the thumbnail previews are not working. It would be great if you could share with us why it is not working and when you want to solve that problem. (I am from Germany - EU Server here as well)
